Class TacletBuilderManipulators

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.varexp.TacletBuilderManipulators
public class TacletBuilderManipulators extends Object
This class manages the register of various factories for the different built-in VariableConditions.

  • Constructor Details

    • TacletBuilderManipulators

      public TacletBuilderManipulators()

  • Method Details

    • register

      public static void register(TacletBuilderCommand... cb)
      Announce a TacletBuilderCommand for the use during the interpretation of asts. This affects every following interpretation of rule contextes in TacletPBuilder.

    • register

      public static void register(TacletBuilderCommand cb)
      See Also:
      • register(TacletBuilderCommand...)

    • loadWithServiceLoader

      public static void loadWithServiceLoader()
      Register all TacletBuilderCommand that are found via the Java's ServiceLoader facility.

    • getConditionBuilders

      public static List<TacletBuilderCommand> getConditionBuilders()
      Returns all available TacletBuilderCommands.

    • getConditionBuildersFor

      public static List<TacletBuilderCommand> getConditionBuildersFor(String name)
      Returns all available TacletBuilderCommands that response on the given name.
      See Also:
      • TacletBuilderCommand.isSuitableFor(String)
